FIGURE 2 . Percentage of infants immunized against respiratory syncytial virus through receipt of nirsevimab,* by month and year of birth (A) and age group (B) — 33 states and District of Columbia, † October 2023–March 2024 
* Calculated as the number of infants who received at least 1 dose of nirsevimab during October 1, 2023–March 31, 2024, divided by the number of infants born each month during October 2023–March 2024 to mothers aged 18–49 years.
† Includes Alaska, Arizona, Arkansas, California, Connecticut, Delaware, Florida, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kentucky, Louisiana, Maine, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, Mississippi, Missouri, Montana, Nevada, New Mexico, New York, Ohio, Oklahoma, Pennsylvania, South Dakota, Tennessee, Utah, Vermont, Washington, West Virginia, Wisconsin, and Wyoming.
